visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens on a sunlit urban street corner in Seoul, featuring a prominent purple electric scooter parked on the sidewalk. A hand enters the right side of the frame, gesturing towards the background where a modern multi-story building stands under a clear, bright sky. The lighting is natural and direct, casting soft shadows on the pavement. (2) A woman with long brown hair, wearing a beige baseball cap and a cream-colored zip-up sweater with a brown Prada cross-body bag, appears on screen. She stands in front of a traditional red-brick residential building with a wooden sign reading 'RODEM HOUSE'. She smiles and points enthusiastically toward the entrance, indicating the start of the tour. (3) The woman enters the interior of the homestay, which features a minimalist white aesthetic with bright indoor lighting. She gestures toward a white oval dining table paired with a wooden bench and grey chairs. The background shows an organized space with suitcases, a mirror, and a modern grey door. (4) She moves into a cozy living area containing a grey sofa with pink and patterned cushions, a green circular rug, and a large flat-screen television on a thin stand. Light grey curtains cover the windows in the background, creating a soft, diffused lighting effect. (5) The tour continues into a clean, modern bathroom with purple towels neatly stacked on silver shelves. She points to various bottled toiletries like shampoo and body wash. The walls are tiled in a neutral grey, and the lighting is crisp and cool. (6) She showcases three separate bedrooms; the first two contain combinations of double and twin beds with white linens and grey headboards, while the third is a smaller room with one large bed. Each room has a simple white desk or vanity and grey horizontal blinds on the windows. (7) The video concludes in a compact kitchen area equipped with a silver refrigerator, a microwave, a built-in washing machine, and various cooking utensils hanging on a rack. The woman stands by the fridge, gesturing to the 'CP value' text overlay with a satisfied expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 韓國弘大民宿. [Slogan]: 出捷運就到. [Subtitle]: 大家好. (2) [Subtitle]: 這次我們首爾住弘大這個民宿我覺得超級讚. (3) [Subtitle]: 弘大7號出口B1. [Logo]: RODEM HOUSE. (4) [Subtitle]: 電梯出來轉角. [Variety]: 空間都很足夠. (5) [Variety]: 三間都有對外窗. [Variety]: CP值超高.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a beige baseball cap, a white/cream zip-up sweater, and a brown Prada cross-body bag. Later seen in a blue and white patterned cardigan with a pink beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban street in Hongdae, Seoul, with red-brick buildings and modern glass structures, followed by the clean, white interior of a multi-room homestay apartment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins the narration over a bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady synth bassline. A sharp 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the introduction of the topic. The voice has a high arousal level and clear enunciation. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the speaker transitions to describing the location's proximity to the subway. The music remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing an energetic bed for the rapid speech. (3) Short 'pop' sound effects are peppered throughout the audio as different interior features of the homestay are introduced. The speaker's pitch rises during expressions of excitement. Minimal background city noise is faintly audible during outdoor segments but is heavily suppressed. (4) As the tour moves through the bedrooms, the narration remains dense and informative. The sounds of a door clicking open and light footsteps on a hard floor are briefly audible under the music. The acoustic texture is clean and professional. (5) The speaker concludes with a final enthusiastic summary of the 'CP value,' accompanied by a conclusive musical cadence. The overall audio mix is bright with high spectral clarity and a dominant vocal presence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Room Tour -> Facility Review -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a detailed and enthusiastic review of a specific homestay (Rodem House) in Hongdae, Seoul, highlighting its convenience, cleanliness, and value for travelers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear identification of the homestay name 'Rodem House' and detailed showcasing of its facilities with promotional pricing/value commentary.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and bright colors to appeal to young travelers looking for affordable accommodation in Seoul.
